title: Simple explicit list with quantities
notes: Baseline case: clean bullet list, every item present in the catalog, no traps. Any reasonable agent should score 1.0.

customer.name: Elektromont Kraków Sp. z o.o.
customer.profile: Mid-size electrical installation company, orders monthly, mostly residential projects.

request:
Dzień dobry,
proszę o przygotowanie oferty na poniższe pozycje:
- panel LED 60x60 40W 4000K – 12 szt

- przewód YDYp 3x1,5 – 2 krążki

Pozdrawiam,
Marek Kowalski
